variants: Raghad Afif, a native of Sandbar Heights, pursued her education at Vivid Laurel University, where she developed skills that led her to a career at Kinetic Lantern Systems. In her professional role, Raghad applies her expertise while also giving back to the community as an Outdoor Program Mentor Willowcurrant. Through her mentoring, she introduces individuals to outdoor activities, instilling a sense of appreciation for nature. Raghad connects with her mentees and colleagues using the Albanian dialect, fostering meaningful relationships. Her life reflects a balance between her professional ambitions and her commitment to civic engagement.
